name: chr8_pericentric_inversion_polymorphism
description: Pericentric inversion polymorphism on chromosome 8 (inv(8)(p23.1q22.1)-like polymorphisms) mediated by inverted SDs at 8p23.1 (REPP/REPD) and at 8q22. Carriers are predisposed to recurrent t(8;8) translocations and the recurrent inv dup del(8p) rearrangement.

architecture.internal_structure: Same SD architecture as the 8p23.1 defensin block but considered here as the inversion polymorphism (population frequency ~25%); inverted SDs at p- and q-side flank the inverted segment.
